summary: Backend testing complete for VIP Stories (24h Ephemeral) and Push Notifications features. All 27 tests PASSED. Fixed one bug in POST /api/notifications/mark-read endpoint.

minor.issue: FIXED: Function parameter issue - was expecting List[str] but needed Pydantic model for JSON body

critical_code_review_comments: All requested Stories endpoints fully functional: create, get, view, react, delete
All requested Push Notification endpoints functional: register-token, history, mark-read, unregister-token
Stories are ephemeral (24h) with proper expiration handling
5 emoji reactions supported: ❤️ 🔥 👏 🚀 💎 - URL encoding required for curl testing
Invalid emoji reactions properly return 400 error
Stories grouped by author in GET response with has_unseen flag
Push tokens validated for Expo format (must start with ExponentPushToken[)
Expo Push Service integration is REAL (not mocked) - sends to https://exp.host/--/api/v2/push/send
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added MarkNotificationsRequest Pydantic model, fixed mark_notifications_read function
seed_data_creation: Test stories created during testing (24h TTL, auto-cleanup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All VIP Stories and Push Notifications endpoints functional. Stories have 24h expiration. Emojis must be URL-encoded for API calls. Expo Push Service is real integration.

api_endpoints_tested.result: Creates ephemeral story expiring in 24h, awards 10 gamification points
Returns active stories grouped by author with has_unseen, views_count, reactions, user_reaction
Marks story as viewed, increments views_count
Reacts to story, toggles off if same emoji, sends notification to author
Returns notification history with id, title, body, type, data, is_read, created_at
Marks specific or all notifications as read (empty array = mark all)

data.title: CryptonAI VIP
data.body: User reacted with 🔥 to your story

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: POST /api/notifications/mark-read endpoint was expecting List[str] parameter directly, but FastAPI needs Pydantic model for JSON body
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Added MarkNotificationsRequest Pydantic model with notification_ids: List[str] = []

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKED APIs - Expo Push Service is REAL via https://exp.host/--/api/v2/push/send
